features.name: always_ff with asynchronous active-low reset
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with a dual-edge sensitivity list combining posedge clock and negedge active-low reset, where non-blocking assignments are guarded by an active-low reset condition using bitwise NOT

features.name: FSM current-state register updated from next-state in always_ff
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block that implements an FSM where the current-state register (CS) is non-blockingly assigned from a separate combinational next-state variable (NS) on each clock edge

features.name: multiple non-blocking assignments to independent registers in single always_ff
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block that issues multiple non-blocking assignments to several independent registers under the same clock edge, including a state register and data pipeline registers

features.name: conditional non-blocking assignment with nested if-else in always_ff
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block containing nested if-else branches each with a non-blocking assignment to the same register, testing that only the taken branch updates the flop value
